content: Hoobastank - The Reason (Lyrics): ⭐Follow Dead Radio Club: Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/davcev/?hl=en Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0xF5l1EUXHQUG8jryaJrfN?si=bee0d3552a124b39 🔴 Picture : https://lexica.art/ ⭐Hoobastank: https://www.instagram.com/hoobastank/?hl=en Lyrics: I'm not a perfect person There's many things I wish I didn't do But I continue learning I never meant to do those things to you And so I have to say before I go That I just want you to know I've found a reason for me To change who I used to be A reason to start over new And the reason is you I'm sorry that I hurt you It's somethin' I must live with every day And all the pain I put you through I wish that I could take it all away And be the one who catches all your tears That's why I need you to hear I've found a reason for me To change who I used to be A reason to start over new And the reason is you And the reason is you And the reason is you And the reason is you I'm not a perfect person I never meant to do those things to you And so I have to say before I go That I just want you to know I've found a reason for me To change who I used to be A reason to start over new And the reason is you I've found a reason to show A side of me you didn't know A reason for all that I do And the reason is you Contact: deadradioclubmusic@gmail.com _________________________________________________ Hoobastank - The Reason Released 28/10/2023 From the album "The Reason" #Hoobastank #alternative

chineseContent: Hoobastank - The Reason（歌词）：⭐关注 Dead Radio Club：Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/davcev/?hl=en Spotify：https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0xF5l1EUXHQUG8jryaJrfN?si=bee0d3552a124b39 🔴图片：https://lexica.art/ ⭐Hoobastank：https://www.instagram.com/hoobastank/?hl=en 歌词：我不是一个完美的人 有很多事情我希望我没有做 但我继续学习 我从来没有想过要对你做这些事 所以我在走之前必须说 我只是想让你知道 我已经找到了我的理由 改变我曾经的样子 重新开始的理由 而原因是你 我很抱歉我伤害了你 这是我每天都必须忍受的事情以及我给你带来的所有痛苦我希望我能把这一切带走并成为那个接住你所有眼泪的人这就是为什么我需要你听到我为我找到了一个理由改变我曾经的样子一个重新开始的理由而原因就是你而原因就是你而原因就是你而原因就是你我不是一个完美的人我从来没有想过对你做那些事情所以我在走之前必须说我只想你知道我找到了一个理由 改变我曾经的样子 一个重新开始的理由 原因就是你 我找到了一个理由来展示你不知道的我的一面 我所做的一切的原因 原因就是你 联系方式：deadradioclubmusic@gmail.com _________________________________________________ Hoobastank - The Reason 发布于 2023 年 10 月 28 日 来自专辑“The Reason” #Hoobastank #alternative
